content:
Your city doesn't need another car. The VeloCargo City 250W folds in seconds, carries 55kg of cargo, and covers 80km on a single charge. It parks in your hallway. It fits in your elevator. And it costs less to run for a year than one month of city parking.

The 250W rear hub motor is EU road-legal (EN 15194 compliant), paired with an integrated 36V/15Ah Samsung battery that delivers a genuine 80km range per charge. Hydraulic Shimano disc brakes. Integrated front and rear lights with a USB-C charging port. Smart display with GPS, cadence tracking, and battery management.

The rear rack handles 40kg. The front basket handles 15kg. That's a full week of groceries, a small business delivery run, or everything you were carrying in the car you're about to sell.

Available in matte black, forest green, slate grey, and sunrise orange. EU delivery in 3–5 days. 2-year comprehensive warranty. VDE certified battery.

Price: €1,499 standard. €1,899 with cargo box.
